_comment: MANUAL MAINTENANCE REQUIRED: This file contains static game data that is hardcoded in the game client and not exportable from game objects. Must be manually updated when the game changes.

professions._comment: Skill caps from Player.cs and GatherItem.cs. Skill cap is where crafting/gathering stops giving skill gains (> threshold).

alchemy._comment: Source: Utils.cs GetSuccessChanceProb(). Formula: min(1, base_success + skill * skill_multiplier).

cooking._comment: Source: Utils.cs GetSuccessChanceProbCooking(). Same formulas as alchemy.

herbalism._comment: Source: GatherItem.cs GetSuccessProbHerbalism(). Formula: min(1, base_success + skill * skill_multiplier).

mining._comment: Source: Utils.cs GetSuccessProbMining(). Formula: min(1, base_success + skill * skill_multiplier + tool_level * tool_multiplier).

slayer._comment: Source: Combat.cs:554-561. Reduces damage taken from boss/elite monsters. Only activates at >= 10% skill.

leveling._comment: Source: Player.cs:8683-8696, GameManager.cs:470. Gained by killing bosses/elites, up to 50 kills each.

hunter._comment: Source: Monster.cs:2297. Increases drop rate for quality items (quality > 0) when killing hunt-type monsters.

radiant_seeker._comment: Source: GatherItem.cs:362. Chance to receive Radiant Aether when gathering Radiant Sparks.

adventuring._comment: Source: ScriptableItem.cs:50, UINpcTrading.cs:357. Required level to purchase certain items from vendors.

treasure_hunter._comment: Source: TreasureLocation.cs:87-94. Tracks treasure maps found. No direct gameplay bonus found.

lore_keeping._comment: Source: UIProfessions.cs:262-268. Tracks books collected. No direct gameplay bonus found.

exploring._comment: Source: UIProfessions.cs:270-276. Tracks zones discovered. No direct gameplay bonus found.

experience._comment: Source: Experience.cs, Monster.cs, Player.cs, GatherItem.cs, ZoneTrigger.cs. EXP formulas and lookup tables.

monster_kill._comment: Source: Monster.cs:2802-2829. Base EXP formula with type and health multipliers.

health_bonus._comment: Source: Monster.cs:2817-2826. Additional EXP based on monster max health.

level_difference_scaling._comment: Source: Experience.cs:430-466. Multiplier applied based on player vs monster level difference.

crafting_exp_by_quality._comment: Source: Player.cs:10309-10318. EXP granted when crafting items.

alchemy_exp_by_quality._comment: Source: Player.cs:10085-10096. EXP granted when crafting potions.

augment_exp_by_quality._comment: Source: Player.cs:10238-10246. EXP granted when applying augments.

gathering_exp_by_level._comment: Source: GatherItem.cs:533-546. EXP granted when gathering resources.

zone_discovery._comment: Source: ZoneTrigger.cs:148-174. EXP granted when discovering new zones.

level_thresholds._comment: Source: Experience.cs:26-30, 325-335. EXP needed to reach next level.

modifiers._comment: Source: Various. Buffs/debuffs that modify EXP gains.
